description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Quartermaster Enuril. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Recipe: Elixir of Major Firepower

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Elixir of Major Firepower Item Level 69 Binds when picked up Requires Alchemy (345) Requires The Scryers - Revered Use: Teaches you how to make an Elixir of Major Firepower. Sell Price: 1 50 Elixir of Major Firepower Item Level 64 Requires Level 50 Use: Increases fire spell damage by up to 55 for 1 hour. Battle Elixir.
